description: Overview of modeling techniques and methods used in decision analysis, including multiattribute utility models, decision trees, and Bayesian models. Psychological components of decision making are discussed. Elicitation techniques for model building are emphasized. Practical applications through real world model building are described and conducted.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (STAT/​MATH  309,STAT 311, orSTAT/​MATH  431), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
